properties.query: select * from user
select * from user where user_no = ?
select user_id from user where user_name = ? and user_phone_number = ?
select user_password from user where user_id = ? and user_phone_number = ?
SELECT user_no, user_id, user_password, user_role FROM user WHERE user_id = ? AND user_password = ? AND status = 1
INSERT INTO user (user_id, user_password, user_name, user_phone_number, user_role) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?);
UPDATE `user` SET status = false WHERE user_id = ? AND user_password = ? AND status = true
select * from student
select * from student where student_id = ?
select user_price from user where user_no = ?
select student_id from student where user_no = ?
select * from user where user_no = ?
select * from user where user_role = ?
update user set user_name = ?, user_password = ?, user_phone_number = ? where user_no = ?
select * from instructor
select instructor_id from instructor where user_no = ?

SELECT c.course_id, c.title, u.user_no, u.user_id, u.user_name, u.user_phone_number FROM course c JOIN enrollment e ON c.course_id = e.course_id JOIN student s ON e.student_id = s.student_id JOIN user u ON s.user_no = u.user_no WHERE u.status = true ORDER BY c.course_id;
SELECT user_no, user_id, user_password, user_name, user_phone_number, user_price, user_role, created_at, status FROM user WHERE user_role = 'instructor' AND user_name LIKE ?;
SELECT user_no, user_id, user_password, user_name, user_phone_number, user_price, user_role, created_at, status FROM user WHERE user_role = 'student';
update user set user_name = ?, user_password = ?, user_phone_number = ? where user_no = ?
select * FROM user WHERE status = 0 AND user_role = 'student';
DELETE FROM user WHERE user_no = ? AND status = 0
select * FROM user WHERE status = 0 AND user_role = 'instructor';
